name: galloways-finale
description: Galloways Insurance Agencies & Consultancy Services - Complete Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd api && pnpm run start:dev" "cd frontend && pnpm run dev"
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && cd frontend && pnpm install && cd ../api && pnpm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules api/node_modules frontend/dist api/dist

author: Galloways Insurance Agencies
